source: extracted from references/brain-mappings.md of website-seo-aeo-auditor v3
usage: For each failed/warned check in an audit, look up the check_id here to get Sieve rule + anti-pattern IDs. Fetch those from the Sieve database directly (SQL, not keyword search). Attach as evidence citations in the finding. If a check has no mapping, finding stands on static-rules alone.

A1_https_enforcement.notes: Rule 1489 (0.95) 'Enforce HTTPS across entire domain for AI citation trust.' AP#812 'Operating key pages without HTTPS.'

A4_canonical_tag.notes: AP#264 'Specifying conflicting canonical URLs across different methods' (high, seo).

A5_robots_meta_indexing.notes: Rule 1166 (0.99) 'Noindex excludes page.' Rule 1440 (0.99) 'AI Overviews indexing requirement.' AP#785 'Blocking Googlebot.' AP#793 'Applying nosnippet/noindex to AI Overview content.'

A9_viewport_meta.notes: AP#326 'Mobile version containing less content than desktop' (high, seo).

A10_robots_txt_crawling.notes: Rule 1442 (0.98) 'AI Overviews crawlability requirement.' Rule 534 (0.99) 'noindex in robots.txt not supported by Google.' Rule 1165 (0.99) 'Googlebot access blocked by robots.txt.'

A11_sitemap_referenced.notes: Rule 563 (0.99) 'Absolute URLs required in sitemaps.' Rule 1482 (0.90) 'Submit sitemaps with accurate lastmod for Perplexity crawling.'

A12_js_rendering_dependency.notes: Rule 1481 (0.99) 'Serve content in raw HTML for Perplexity.' AP#325 'Relying solely on client-side rendering' (high). AP#804 'Hiding key content behind JavaScript' (high).

B10_core_web_vitals.notes: Rule #7176 (Backlinko, 0.95) 'LCP Good Threshold Under 2.5 Seconds.' Rule #7190 (Backlinko, 0.95) 'INP Threshold 200ms for Good Responsiveness.' AP#277 'LCP exceeding 2.5s' (high, seo).

C1_heading_hierarchy.notes: AP#773 'Using generic or vague heading labels.'

C2_keyword_first_100_words.notes: Rule 1448 (0.95) 'Answer-first structure for AI Overview citation.' AP#774 'Burying key answers after preamble.'

C3_internal_links.notes: AP#295 'Using non-anchor elements for navigation links' (high, seo).

C6_word_count_thin_content.notes: AP#800 'Publishing thin content that only summarises existing information' (high). AP#1328 'Thin content that only defines terms and lists basic tips' (high, almcorp).

C8_outbound_citations.notes: Rule 1478 (0.92) 'Cite primary authoritative sources inline for AI trust signals.'

C12_visible_date_staleness.notes: Rule 1474 (0.95) 'Signal content freshness with visible timestamps and substantive updates.' AP#799 'Cosmetic timestamp updates without substantive content changes' (medium).

D1_jsonld_present.notes: Rule 3 (0.90) 'Schema markup coverage rule.' AP#4763 (Backlinko, high) 'Omitting Schema Markup' — primary AEO failure pattern.

D3_page_appropriate_type.notes: Rule 1696 (0.98) 'Product schema must not be applied to category listing pages.' Rule 1682 (Schema.org, 0.97) 'Use LocalBusiness Instead of Bare Place for Commercial Entities.'

D5_breadcrumblist.notes: Rules 1555-1557 (all 0.99) cover BreadcrumbList itemListElement, position, and name requirements.

D6_required_fields.notes: Rule 1710 (0.99) 'Product: name and offers mandatory.' Rule 1668 (0.98) 'Organization must include name and URL.' Rule 1600 (0.98) 'FAQPage mainEntity and acceptedAnswer required.' Rule 1532 (0.99) 'AggregateRating must have ratingValue and count.'

D7_recommended_fields_person.notes: Rule 1678 (0.92) 'Person affiliation and worksFor for authority signals.' Rule 1679 (0.90) 'Person hasCredential for expertise documentation.'

D9_faqpage_schema_vs_visible.notes: Rule 1495 (0.98) 'FAQPage requires visible content.' Rule 1496 (0.98) 'Markup text must match visible content.' Rule 7375 (Schema.org, 0.98) 'Schema Markup Must Match Visible Content.' AP#815 'Including promotional content in FAQ answers' (high). AP#816 'Writing truncated FAQ answers' (medium).

D11_datepublished_datemodified.notes: Rule 1474 (0.95) freshness timestamps. AP#799 cosmetic-only updates.

D12_author_person_schema.notes: Rule 1674 (0.99) Person must include name. Rule 1676 (0.98) Person author for E-E-A-T. Rule 1678 (0.92) affiliation/worksFor. Rule 1679 (0.90) hasCredential. AP#798 'Publishing anonymous content without authorship signals.'

E3_googlebot_allowed.notes: Rule 1442 (0.98) AI Overviews crawlability. Rule 1440 (0.99) AI Overviews indexing. AP#785 'Blocking Googlebot.'

E5_content_in_raw_html.notes: Rule 2015 (amsive.com, 0.97) 'AI Crawler JavaScript Avoidance Rule.' Rule 1426 (Bing, 0.97) 'JavaScript-Only Content Excluded from Bing Index.'

E6_content_not_behind_accordions.notes: Rule 1451 (0.93) 'Avoid hiding content behind interactive elements.' AP#768 (high). AP#783 (high).

E13_ccbot_llm_training_access.notes: Rule 2016 (amsive.com, 0.95) 'CCBot (Common Crawl) Access for LLM Training Recognition.' CCBot affects training-time brand recognition.

F1_first_paragraph_answers_query.notes: Rule 1448 (Google, 0.95) 'Answer-first structure for AI Overview citation.' Rule 1471 (Perplexity, 0.97) 'Lead with Direct Answer.' Rule 1472 (Perplexity, 0.97) 'Use Specific Verifiable Facts.' AP#4698 (Backlinko, high) 'Burying the Answer.'

F3_faq_section.notes: Rule 1477 (0.93) 'Add JSON-LD FAQ schema and semantic HTML5.' Rule 1500 (0.93) 'Write self-contained FAQ answers.'

F4_faq_semantic_markup.notes: Rule 1495 (0.98) 'FAQPage requires visible content.' Rule 1496 (0.98) 'Markup text must match visible content.'

F7_named_entities_density.notes: AP#2 'Orphaned entity mentions' (high, entity). AP#4714 (Backlinko, high) 'Neglecting LLM-Friendly Formatting.'

F8_specific_facts.notes: Rule 1420 (0.94) 'Avoid unverifiable promotional language in AI-targeted content.'

F11_self_contained_answer_units.notes: Rule 1500 (0.93) 'Write self-contained FAQ answers.' AP#4602 (Backlinko, high) 'Context-Dependent Sections.' AP#4623 (Backlinko, high) 'Human-Only Structure.'

F12_tables_lists.notes: Rule 1450 (0.90) 'Structured content formats for AI grounding.' Rule 1434 (0.92) 'AI Mode comparative content optimisation.'

G_aeo_trust_ymyl_credibility.notes: AP#1064 (amsive.com, high risk) 'Failing to prioritize credibility and accuracy for medical/high-trust query categories.'

misc_thin_content_no_named_experts.notes: AP#1328 (almcorp.com, high) 'Thin content composed primarily of basic definitions or summaries.'

misc_brand_without_schema.notes: AP#4756 (Backlinko, medium) 'Relying Solely on Brand Building Without Schema Markup for Entity Recognition.'

misc_conflicting_brand_signals.notes: AP#4509 (Search Engine Land, high) 'Conflicting brand/entity signals across platforms and sources.'

truth_badges.HARD_EVIDENCE: Direct observable fact from curl response or page HTML (e.g., HTTP status code, presence/absence of a tag, exact character count).
truth_badges.MEASURED: Quantitative value from a deterministic measurement (e.g., TTFB median, visible word count, schema entity count).
truth_badges.STATIC_RULE: Pass/fail against a pre-defined criterion from static-rules.md. The rule doesn't require brain lookup.
truth_badges.COMPARATIVE: Finding based on comparison against crawled competitors (e.g., 'competitor has 10 FAQs, you have 0').
truth_badges.HEURISTIC: Directional assessment that is likely but not provably correct (e.g., 'H1 doesn't describe brand value prop').
truth_badges.MODEL_JUDGMENT: LLM-authored assessment of subjective quality (e.g., 'content tone inconsistent with category'). Explicitly softer evidence.
